description_long: This rifle features a robust design with a combination of dark metal and polished wood components. The stock and foregrip are crafted from wood, providing a classic and sturdy appearance, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from dark metal. The rifle has a fixed wooden stock, a straight magazine well beneath the receiver, and a prominent barrel extending forward. Iron sights are mounted on the top, and the trigger guard and pistol grip are clearly defined. The overall build suggests a utilitarian firearm, likely modeled after historical submachine guns such as the Thompson.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, dark metal receiver, and iron sights, evoking a vintage military style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, foregrip, and metal receiver.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view showing the rifle's slim profile and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, foregrip, and the magazine well beneath the receiver.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the alignment of the barrel, receiver, and wooden components.
